# Hexagonal Architecture Template for Rust
# Generated by Phenotype Repos Hub

## Directory Structure

```
{{crate_name}}/
├── src/
│   ├── domain/                  # Pure domain logic (innermost layer)
│   │   ├── entities/           # Core business objects with identity
│   │   │   ├── mod.rs
│   │   │   └── *.rs
│   │   ├── value_objects/      # Immutable types without identity
│   │   │   ├── mod.rs
│   │   │   └── *.rs
│   │   ├── aggregates/         # Aggregate roots managing consistency
│   │   │   ├── mod.rs
│   │   │   └── *.rs
│   │   ├── services/           # Domain services (cross-entity logic)
│   │   │   ├── mod.rs
│   │   │   └── *.rs
│   │   ├── events/             # Domain events
│   │   │   ├── mod.rs
│   │   │   └── *.rs
│   │   └── ports/              # Port interfaces (traits)
│   │       ├── inbound/        # Primary/driving ports (use case interfaces)
│   │       │   ├── mod.rs
│   │       │   └── *.rs
│   │       └── outbound/       # Secondary/driven ports (infrastructure)
│   │           ├── mod.rs
│   │           └── *.rs
│   │
│   ├── application/            # Application layer (orchestration)
│   │   ├── use_cases/         # Application use cases
│   │   │   ├── mod.rs
│   │   │   └── *.rs
│   │   ├── dto/               # Data transfer objects
│   │   │   ├── mod.rs
│   │   │   └── *.rs
│   │   ├── commands/          # Command handlers (write operations)
│   │   │   ├── mod.rs
│   │   │   └── *.rs
│   │   └── queries/           # Query handlers (read operations)
│   │       ├── mod.rs
│   │       └── *.rs
│   │
│   ├── adapters/              # Infrastructure adapters (outermost layer)
│   │   ├── inbound/           # Primary adapters (UI, API, CLI)
│   │   │   ├── http/          # REST/gRPC controllers
│   │   │   │   ├── mod.rs
│   │   │   │   └── *.rs
│   │   │   └── cli/           # CLI commands
│   │   │       ├── mod.rs
│   │   │       └── *.rs
│   │   └── outbound/          # Secondary adapters (DB, Cache, External)
│   │       ├── persistence/   # Database adapters
│   │       │   ├── mod.rs
│   │       │   └── *.rs
│   │       ├── cache/         # Cache adapters
│   │       │   ├── mod.rs
│   │       │   └── *.rs
│   │       └── external/      # External service clients
│   │           ├── mod.rs
│   │           └── *.rs
│   │
│   └── lib.rs                 # Module root with public re-exports
│
├── tests/
│   ├── unit/                   # Unit tests
│   │   ├── domain/
│   │   ├── application/
│   │   └── adapters/
│   ├── integration/            # Integration tests
│   └── contracts/              # Contract tests (port implementations)
│
├── Cargo.toml
├── Cargo.lock
├── README.md
├── CLAUDE.md
├── AGENTS.md
└── ADR.md
```

## Dependency Rule

The core principle of hexagonal architecture:

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    ADAPTERS (Outer)                     │
│   HTTP Controllers, CLI, DB, Cache, External Clients    │
│   [Depends on Ports, not on Domain directly]           │
└───────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────┘
                            │ implements
                            ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                   PORTS (Interfaces)                    │
│         Primary: Use Case Inputs (inbound)              │
│        Secondary: Infrastructure Outputs (outbound)     │
└───────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────┘
                            │ used by
                            ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                 APPLICATION (Middle)                    │
│         Use Cases, Commands, Queries, DTOs              │
│      [Orchestrates domain, depends on inbound ports]    │
└───────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────┘
                            │ uses
                            ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    DOMAIN (Inner)                        │
│    Entities, Value Objects, Domain Services, Events     │
│        [NO external dependencies allowed]               │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Module Dependencies

```rust
// domain - NO dependencies on application or adapters
// domain::ports::outbound - defines traits for infrastructure
// domain::entities - uses value_objects, emits events

// application - depends ONLY on domain
// application::use_cases - depends on inbound ports, uses domain services

// adapters - depend on domain ports (implement outbound) and application
// adapters::inbound::http - depends on application use cases
// adapters::outbound::persistence - implements domain port traits
```

## Example: Order Aggregate

```rust
// src/domain/entities/order.rs
use crate::domain::value_objects::{Money, OrderId};
use crate::domain::events::OrderEvent;
use crate::domain::ports::outbound::EventPublisher;

pub struct Order {
    id: OrderId,
    items: Vec<OrderItem>,
    status: OrderStatus,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
pub enum OrderStatus { Draft, Confirmed, Shipped, Cancelled }

impl Order {
    pub fn new(id: OrderId) -> Self {
        Order { id, items: Vec::new(), status: OrderStatus::Draft }
    }

    pub fn confirm(&mut self) -> Result<Vec<OrderEvent>, OrderError> {
        if self.items.is_empty() {
            return Err(OrderError::EmptyOrder);
        }
        self.status = OrderStatus::Confirmed;
        Ok(vec![OrderEvent::OrderConfirmed { order_id: self.id.clone() }])
    }
}
```

## Example: Inbound Port (Use Case)

```rust
// src/domain/ports/inbound/order_commands.rs
use crate::domain::entities::Order;
use crate::domain::value_objects::OrderId;
use crate::application::dto::OrderDto;

pub trait OrderCommandPort: Send + Sync {
    fn create_order(&self, dto: OrderDto) -> Result<Order, OrderError>;
    fn confirm_order(&self, order_id: OrderId) -> Result<Order, OrderError>;
}
```

## Example: Outbound Port (Infrastructure)

```rust
// src/domain/ports/outbound/order_repository.rs
use crate::domain::entities::Order;
use crate::domain::value_objects::OrderId;

pub trait OrderRepository: Send + Sync {
    fn save(&self, order: &Order) -> Result<(), RepositoryError>;
    fn find_by_id(&self, id: &OrderId) -> Result<Option<Order>, RepositoryError>;
    fn find_all(&self) -> Result<Vec<Order>, RepositoryError>;
}
```

## Testing Strategy

| Test Type | Location | What to Test |
|-----------|----------|--------------|
| Unit | `tests/unit/domain/` | Entities, Value Objects, Domain Services |
| Unit | `tests/unit/application/` | Use Cases, Command/Query Handlers |
| Contract | `tests/contracts/` | Verify adapter implements port correctly |
| Integration | `tests/integration/` | Full flow with real infrastructure |

## Key Files

- `Cargo.toml` - Workspace member configuration
- `src/lib.rs` - Public API surface (re-export domain types)
- `ADR.md` - Architecture Decision Record for this crate
